name: @rblaine95/omp-plugins
description: rblaine95 personal oh-my-pi extensions, installable via `omp plugin install`.

rules-guard.description: Enforce the Claude permissions allow/deny policy across all omp tools (read/write/edit/find/search/bash/eval/browser).

usage-status.description: Show remaining subscription usage and reset countdowns for every provider, in a color-coded row above the omp editor.
